name: Tower of God RPG
description:
"What do you desire? Honor and pride? Power and influence? Money and riches? Revenge? Or... To transcend all such things?"

"For what do you risk your life to climb the tower? Whatever you desire, you will find it here."


"Welcome to the Tower of God."

This is my first bot, so it may be shitty. I pretty much just made this because nobody else had made a Tower of God RPG bot, so I decided. "Eh, why not?" I may get the bare-bones information wrong so please tell me if I'm wrong about Shinsu or Shinsoo, however you pronounce it. But do not blame me for the bot getting the info wrong. I have only watched the anime (S1 and S2) so I won't know much of the manhwa outside of what I have seen.




"The real homie." - Aidan
creator: AidanJT
